provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture, visible brushstrokes, architectural interior or exterior, tall thin vertical space station floating in space — narrow rotating cylinder bristling with communication arrays and data relay dishes, antenna arrays extending from every surface, clean steel-blue hull with corporate Compact logo visible, looks like a broadcast tower not a habitat, precise and bureaucratic even in silhouette, orbiting alone against starfield
